vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque
Mounting flange ISO 9409
5kg payload, 600mm reach
Welding cell deployment, heat-shielded links, spark-resistant cable routing

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to high torque operation.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management features such as cooling channels and heat sinks.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to inadequate strain relief.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have proper strain relief geometry and routing.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to unclear assembly sequence.
risk.mit: Define a clear assembly sequence with tool, torque, and datum information.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure under high torque due to insufficient stiffening.
risk.mit: Add stiffening features such as ribs or channels to the base plate.

risk.desc: Risk of service access obstruction due to complex geometry.
risk.mit: Ensure all service access points are clearly marked and accessible.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409
physics_paths: load: base plate to floor, harmonic drive to arm links
motion: base plate rotation, harmonic drive transmission
thermal: heat dissipation from harmonic drive to environment
human/service access: base plate for maintenance, cable entry for service

adjacent_interfaces.assembly_order_hint: align harmonic drive, then press fit

verification_focus.description: verify base plate structural integrity under 100Nm torque
verify harmonic drive transmission efficiency
verify temperature rise under 100Nm torque
verify cable entry and harness routing

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to heat dissipation from harmonic drive reducer.
risk.mit: Implement additional cooling measures and monitor thermal performance during testing.

risk.desc: Cable routing through center bore may introduce pinch points.
risk.mit: Review cable routing design and ensure adequate clearance and strain relief.

risk.desc: Insufficient preload evidence for critical joints.
risk.mit: Add visible locking mechanisms and ensure proper preload documentation.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment due to bolted connection at shoulder interface.
risk.mit: Optimize bearing seat design for better alignment and preload.

risk.desc: Limited clearance at wrist module interface may restrict motion.
risk.mit: Increase clearance at wrist module interface to ensure smooth motion.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

physics_paths.description: Shoulder joint J2 transfers rotational torque to the wrist module interface
Cable spine passes through the center bore of the shoulder joint to reach the wrist module
Heat from the harmonic drive reducer is dissipated through the heat shield
Electrical signals pass from the connector mate to the wrist module interface

integration_opportunities.description: Optimize bearing seat for harmonic drive reducer
Improve reducer dummy for better alignment and preload
Enhance shoulder for better load distribution
Refine wrist module interface for smoother motion
Optimize center bore for cable spine routing

verification_focus.description: Verify joint torque capacity and preload
Ensure cable spine is routed without pinch points
Evaluate heat dissipation from harmonic drive reducer
Check electrical signal integrity through connector mate
